compressed_prompt: Compose two angry limericks on moms' struggle to get kids to do chores. Use no commas. Separate with six asterisks (******).
response:
A mom roared to clean up your room
But her child was consumed by gloom
The toys on the floor
Increased more and more
Her rage shook the walls with a boom

******

She demanded the dishes get done
But her child thought chores were no fun
He fled from the sink
With a smirk and a wink
Now her last weary nerve has come undone
